mapper.insert: INSERT INTO seckill_session (product_id, seckill_price, total_stock, sold_stock, start_time, end_time, per_user_limit, status) VALUES (#{productId}, #{seckillPrice}, #{totalStock}, #{soldStock}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{perUserLimit}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM seckill_session ORDER BY start_time DESC
SELECT * FROM seckill_session WHERE status = 1 AND end_time >= #{now} ORDER BY start_time ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE seckill_session SET product_id = #{productId}, seckill_price = #{seckillPrice}, total_stock = #{totalStock}, start_time = #{startTime}, end_time = #{endTime}, per_user_limit = #{perUserLimit}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE seckill_session SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
